message:
fix(net): refactor unix socket bind cleanup and add DNS hostname label validation

Unix sockets (listener + datagram):
- Extract shared finalize_bound_socket() helper that captures inode identity
  before returning the wrapper, ensuring cleanup targets only the socket file
  created by this specific bind call
- Add from_bound_with() constructors that accept a post-bind configure closure,
  cleanly rolling back the socket file on init failure
- Refactor bind() to delegate to from_bound_with() with set_nonblocking
- Add test_bind_cleanup_on_post_bind_init_failure regression test for datagram

DNS resolver:
- Replace inline label length check with is_valid_lookup_hostname_label() that
  validates RFC 952/1123 hostname labels: alphanumeric start/end, only
  alphanumeric + hyphen interior, no whitespace or special characters
- Add tests: whitespace label rejection, hyphen-only label, trailing-hyphen,
  embedded-control-character, all-numeric label (valid per RFC)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
